intel_bullets: In March 2026, confirmed strikes hit three major Gulf energy terminals — Ras Laffan LNG (Qatar), Shaybah oil field (Saudi Arabia), and Shah gas field (UAE) — during the U.S.-Iran conflict, demonstrating direct adversary action against energy infrastructure.
CSIS confirmed Iran holds demonstrated intent and capability to conduct cyber operations against U.S. critical infrastructure, with threat elevated during active kinetic conflict.

The U.S. Department of Commerce Section 232 investigation formally identified that approximately two-thirds of U.S. wind turbine value is imported, placing renewable energy supply chains under active national security scrutiny.
adversary_bullets: Vestas Wind Energy suffered confirmed ransomware with data exfiltration and manufacturing disruption — direct precedent for this attack class against wind energy OT environments.
A March 14, 2026 ransomware intrusion at the Minot Water Treatment Plant forced 16 hours of manual SCADA fallback, confirming active adversary capability against North American OT infrastructure.
impact_bullets: A ransomware intrusion at the Houston Operations Center would halt real-time monitoring across wind farm telemetry network NA-01, directly disrupting the NextEra Energy maintenance contract and Ontario Wind Power service agreement.

The Toronto Engineering Hub's predictive maintenance IP underpins both commercial agreements — its encryption or exfiltration would erode AeroGrid's service competitive advantage across future contract cycles.
watch_bullets: Any ransomware disclosure by a U.S.- or Canada-based wind energy operator involving OT or SCADA system downtime or maintenance scheduling disruption.
U.S. government or CISA advisories specifically naming renewable energy operators as targets during the Iran conflict arc.
Detection of unusual authentication attempts or access anomalies on systems connected to the NA-01 telemetry network or the Toronto predictive maintenance environment.
action_bullets: Verify offline backup integrity and tested recovery time for OT/SCADA environments.
Confirm IT/OT network segmentation is enforced — no lateral path from corporate to operational systems.

Validate backup and recovery procedures for the NA-01 telemetry network at Houston Operations Center, ensuring recovery time objectives are tested against the 16-hour OT fallback precedent from the Minot incident.
